message:
feat(web): Improve responsive layout for desktop, tablet, and mobile

Major layout improvements across all viewport sizes:

Desktop (1920px+):
- Fixed critical bug where .panel flex display was overriding .two-column grid
- Two-column layout now properly shows sidebar (380px) + main content (1fr)
- Increased list height to 70vh for better phage browsing
- Larger 3D viewer (450-550px) and sequence blocks (500-600px)

Tablet (768-1024px):
- Two-column layout preserved with adjusted proportions (260-320px sidebar)
- Content scales appropriately for landscape and portrait orientations

Mobile (<768px):
- Single column layout with appropriate spacing
- Header now handles long phage names with ellipsis truncation
- Compact buttons and badges to prevent overflow
- Reduced viewer heights for better scrolling experience

Technical fixes:
- Added !important to .two-column display:grid to override .panel flex
- Viewport-relative heights (vh) instead of fixed pixel heights
- Proper flex:1 to fill available space in containers

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
